evidence_quotes.quote: payments in video games (also known as micro transactions)
the problem arises when the company closes the servers of this game

paragraphs.text: Good evening. Today, I learnt about this and I have seen that one of your objectives is to create laws against payments in video games (also known as micro transactions) and I want to mention something that is quite relevant to this. Many others create video games that you need to connect to an online server to play the game regardless of whether the game is a single player or a multiplayer (a game that you play with other people online), the problem arises when the company closes the servers of this game, as soon as you cannot play this game at all even though you bought it with yourself a video game that is a well-known example is ‘The Crew’ by Ubisoft because you have closed the game servers, all those who bought the game are happy and you will not be able to play the video game at all, and you will not be able to play a multiplayer.
